goals.title: PER-4 / P0-T02: Produce a current release-gap matrix that supersedes...
goals.objective: PER-4 / P0-T02: Produce a current release-gap matrix that supersedes stale complete ledgers. Scope: docs/release release-gap matrix, release readiness gate script, .omx planning/ultragoal artifacts only. Acceptance: matrix labels each feature verified, implemented-unverified, planned, or blocked; script fails if final report says production-ready while blockers exist; no product runtime behavior changes; verify with doc review and gate commands; open PR and hand off to QA.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
